mapper.select:
select po.id,po.order_no,po.request_id,po.supplier_id,po.purchaser_id,po.plan_date,po.supplier_date,po.confirm_time, po.total_amount,po.status,po.supplier_note,po.close_time,po.close_reason,po.remark,po.create_time,po.update_time, po.deleted,pr.title as requestTitle,s.name as supplierName,u.name as purchaserName from purchase_order po left join purchase_request pr on po.request_id = pr.id left join supplier s on po.supplier_id = s.id left join user u on po.purchaser_id = u.id
and po.order_no like concat('%',#{q.orderNo},'%')
and pr.title like concat('%',#{q.requestTitle},'%')
and s.name like concat('%',#{q.supplierName},'%')
and u.name like concat('%',#{q.purchaseName},'%')
and po.status = #{q.status}
and po.plan_date between #{q.planDateBegin} and #{q.planDateEnd}

select po.id,po.order_no,po.request_id,po.supplier_id,po.purchaser_id,po.plan_date,po.supplier_date,po.confirm_time, po.total_amount,po.status,po.supplier_note,po.close_time,po.close_reason,po.remark,po.create_time,po.update_time, po.deleted,pr.title as requestTitle,s.name as supplierName,u.name as purchaserName from purchase_order po left join purchase_request pr on po.request_id = pr.id left join supplier s on po.supplier_id = s.id left join user u on po.purchaser_id = u.id where po.id = #{id}
select id from purchase_order where id = #{id} and deleted = 0 for update
